title: The Survival Game Tightens
description: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I fell into a swamp cloud...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Why do I have the feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Maybe everyone is already in there!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The ruins of Shandora are just ahead!!!

summary: The giant serpent Nola turns the battlefield into a trap, scattering fighters and forcing Luffy and others into a stranger survival fight.
